text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer got injured, so I rush her to the
infirmary as fast as possible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Agh... I think I might've really messed up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, but like, should I rest, though? I mean, I dunno if I'm being reckless, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Everyone else is out there working hard, but here
I am just wasting time because I'm in a little bit of
pain...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I let something this small stop me, I dunno if I'll
really be able to run as freely as I want during the
real deal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I can't move at all, so there's gotta be
something I can still do, right? I don't care if it's
super light exercise or whatever.
choice_data_list:
What you need to do now is rest up so you can
run freely later.
...All right. Let's try to keep going.
...All right. Let's try to keep going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I can't move at all, so there's gotta be
something I can still do, right? I don't care if it's
super light exercise or whatever.
choice_data_list:
What you need to do now is rest up so you can
run freely later.
...All right. Let's try to keep going.
...All right. Let's try to keep going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I thought you'd say that... Sorry, things just got
real for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It just sucks that I'm so mentally ready to go out
there and run, but my body's not up for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer's shoulders droop sadly as she
returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yesss! All right, better get warmed back up again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: One, two, three—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Owww!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yikes... I must've twisted it too far!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry. I think I made things worse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If even simple stretches are painful, her injury
must be serious. I tell her to focus on recovery for
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm good to go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I should be able to handle some light exercise, no
problem! Course, I'll be careful not to make my
injury worse!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right! Back to work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer takes care not to exacerbate her
injury and makes it all the way to the end of the
light training session.
